title: euphorbia torta
intro: Euphorbia torta, also known as the Spurge family plant, is a type of succulent native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Euphorbia torta has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, and it can also be used to make a salve or cream for topical application.
